title: Implement automated test suites
goal: Add reliable unit, integration, and end-to-end tests across the web app, Go API, Go MCP server, PostgreSQL migrations, and critical publishing workflows.
scope: Add Go unit tests for auth, config, request validation, response mapping, and MCP tool helpers.
Add API integration tests with disposable PostgreSQL data.
Add frontend unit/component tests for non-trivial client behavior.
Add Playwright E2E tests for public navigation, admin login, draft creation, publish flow, comment moderation, and contact flow.
Document local commands for each test layer.
verification: API integration tests pass against disposable PostgreSQL.
Playwright E2E tests pass locally and in CI.
notes: Added API unit tests for auth, config parsing, public/admin route behavior, JSON decoding, and helper functions.
Added optional API PostgreSQL integration test gated by API_INTEGRATION_DATABASE_URL.
Kept MCP tests and documented optional MCP PostgreSQL integration via MCP_INTEGRATION_DATABASE_URL.
Added Vitest unit tests for SEO/GEO helpers, JSON-LD escaping, sitemap route generation, and structured data.
Added Playwright E2E smoke tests for public navigation, GEO/crawler assets, and admin login gating.
Added migration validation script that applies Up and Down against disposable Docker PostgreSQL.
Verified lint, typecheck, web unit tests, Go API/MCP tests, migration validation, and Playwright E2E locally.
